description: Allow `hex hey run <cmd> on <host>` to execute whitelisted shell commands on remote hosts via hex-agent workers. Introduces a `remote-shell` brain task kind, agent-side poll/execute loop, and a trusted_hosts + command whitelist security model.

phases.description: Extend the hey-hex natural-language classifier (ADR-2604140000) to recognize trailing `on <host>` and route to the new `remote-shell` kind when the host is in .hex/project.json trusted_hosts.
phases.name: Hey classifier — detect 'on <host>' suffix

tasks.description: Add regex + token-tail detection in hex-cli/src/commands/hey.rs: if suffix matches 'on (\\w+)' and host ∈ trusted_hosts, strip suffix, set target_host on the classified task, use kind=remote-shell.
tasks.name: Parse 'on <host>' suffix

tasks.description: Hard-coded initial whitelist: [nvidia-smi, df, ollama, ps, systemctl status, uptime, free]. Reject non-whitelisted commands with a clear error + instruction to add via .hex/project.json.
tasks.name: Command whitelist

phases.description: Add a new brain task kind that serializes {host, command}. Enqueue lands in the brain task table with target_host metadata. Standard brain status/queue views show it.

gate.command: cargo check --workspace && target/debug/hex brain queue list

phases.name: remote-shell brain task kind

tasks.description: Add the variant to hex-nexus/src/routes/brain.rs TaskKind enum; serde tag 'remote-shell'. Persist host+command in payload. Update queue-list rendering to show target host.
tasks.name: TaskKind::RemoteShell variant

phases.description: On hex-agent start, discover this host's name; every tick, query brain queue for pending remote-shell tasks with target_host == hostname; execute via whitelisted shell; PATCH task with stdout/stderr/exit.

gate.command: cargo build -p hex-agent && cargo test -p hex-agent worker::remote_shell

phases.name: hex-agent worker poll + execute loop

tasks.description: Add a polling task in hex-agent main loop: GET /api/brain/queue?kind=remote-shell&host={hostname}. For each pending task, mark in_progress via PATCH, then spawn via tokio::process::Command with argv split + whitelist recheck.
tasks.name: Worker poll

tasks.description: On command completion, PATCH brain task with status=completed and result payload containing stdout (truncated 8KB), stderr, exit code. Timeout 60s; on timeout mark failed.
tasks.name: Result back to brain

phases.description: Log every remote-shell to ~/.hex/audit/remote-shell.jsonl with host/cmd/exit/timestamp. Schema-validate trusted_hosts in .hex/project.json.
phases.name: Audit trail + trusted_hosts config

tasks.description: Append-only JSONL writer with tokio::fs; called from worker on each remote-shell completion (success and failure).
tasks.name: Audit logger
